text:
こりゃそろそろ、へっぽこぴーに
代わる新しい呼び名を用意しないとね！

って、いつも思うんだけど
あんまり真剣に考えてないんだー。

私に本気で考えさせたいなら
アンタももっともっと
本気を見せ

At this rate, I might need to come up with
a new name for you to replace "clown"!

Actually, I have that thought a lot, but I
haven't felt the need to sit down and think
about it seriously.

If you want to put it into my head, you better
show me even more determination!
